paper.title_en: Black hole echos reflect the phase transition and fluctuations in Hawking radiation
paper.abstract_en: Black holes are thermal objects. They can form thermodynamic phases and exhibit phase transitions. Furthermore, black holes can also radiate, termed as Hawking radiation. However, the signatures of these behaviors are challenging to observe. In this work,we consider Hawking radiation in black hole phase transitions. We uncovered that an echo can emerge from the correlations between individual single event and joint two events. This provides possible signature of black hole phase transition and fluctuations in Hawking radiation.

decision.selection_reason_zh: 该论文直接探讨黑洞热力学中的相变和霍金辐射，属于核心主题。理论深度较高，但摘要中方法描述较简，缺乏具体数学模型。作为新论文无引用是中性。
decision.title_zh: 黑洞回波反映霍金辐射中的相变和涨落
decision.abstract_zh: 黑洞是热物体。它们可以形成热力学相并表现出相变。此外，黑洞还可以辐射，称为霍克辐射。然而，这些行为的特征很难观测。在这项工作中，我们考虑了黑洞相变中的霍金辐射。我们发现，回波可以从单个事件和联合两个事件之间的相关性中出现。这为黑洞相变和霍金辐射中的涨落提供了可能的信号。
